settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure Claude Code preferences
settings.failedToLoadSettings: Failed to load settings. Please ensure ~/.claude directory exists.
settings.colorHint: Use CSS color values (hex, rgb, oklch, etc.). Changes apply immediately.
settings.includeCoAuthoredByHint: Add Claude attribution to git commits and pull requests
settings.verboseOutputHint: Show full bash and command outputs
settings.chatTranscriptRetentionHint: How long to retain chat transcripts locally (default: 30 days)
settings.changesWillApplyOnSave: Changes will be applied when you save settings.
settings.analyticsHint: Help improve opcode by sharing anonymous usage data
settings.noPersonalInfoCollected: No personal information or file contents collected
settings.dataAnonymous: All data is anonymous with random IDs
settings.disableAnytime: You can disable analytics at any time
settings.rememberOpenTabsHint: Restore your tabs when you restart the app
settings.tabPersistenceEnabled: Tab persistence enabled - your tabs will be restored on restart
settings.tabPersistenceDisabled: Tab persistence disabled - tabs will not be saved
settings.showWelcomeIntroHint: Display a brief welcome animation when the app launches
settings.permissionRulesHint: Control which tools Claude Code can use without manual approval
settings.noAllowRulesConfigured: No allow rules configured. Claude will ask for approval for all tools.
settings.allowEditingDir: Allow editing files in docs directory
settings.envVarsHint: Environment variables applied to every Claude Code session
settings.advancedSettingsHint: Additional configuration options for advanced users
settings.apiKeyHelperHint: Custom script to generate auth values for API requests
settings.rawSettingsHint: This shows the raw JSON that will be saved to ~/.claude/settings.json
settings.userHooksHint: Configure hooks that apply to all Claude Code sessions for your user account. These are stored in ~/.claude/settings.json
settings.projectHooksStored: Project hooks are stored in .claude/settings.json and are committed to version control, allowing team members to share configurations.
settings.localHooksStored: Local hooks are stored in .claude/settings.local.json and are not committed to version control, perfect for personal preferences.

hooks.title: Hooks Configuration
hooks.configureHooksHint: Configure hooks that run before, during, and after tool executions
hooks.noHooksConfigured: No hooks configured for this event
hooks.patternHint: Tool name pattern (regex supported). Leave empty to match all tools.
hooks.preToolUseDesc: Runs before tool calls, can block and provide feedback
hooks.notificationDesc: Customizes notifications when Claude needs attention
hooks.subagentStopDesc: Runs when a Claude subagent (Task) finishes
hooks.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Click Save to persist them.
hooks.hookTemplatesHint: Choose a pre-configured hook template to get started quickly
hooks.configurationHint: Configure shell commands to execute at various points in Claude Code's lifecycle.
hooks.localSettingsNotCommitted: These settings are not committed to version control.
hooks.unsavedChangesHint: You have unsaved changes. Click Save to persist them.

commands.cannotBeUndone: This action cannot be undone. The command file will be permanently deleted.
